content: Workspaces array is ['excalidraw-app','packages/*','apps/*'] — upstream 'examples/*' dropped. Default branch renamed from 'master' to 'main'.
corepack enable may fail in restrictive sandboxes; yarn 1.22.22 already on PATH unblocks yarn install. Run 'corepack enable && corepack prepare yarn@1.22.22 --activate' manually in real shell.

name: vendored-upstream-patch-journal
description: Excalidraw fork vendored at packages/excalidraw. All local patches logged in decisions/upstream-patches.md. CI fails if a PR modifies a vendored file without adding an entry. Quarterly review gate: continue merges while merge-time <=2h, no patch broken >1x/quarter, customData field intact. Hard exit: pin last-merged version and re-evaluate thin wrapper dependency.

title: Quarterly upstream Excalidraw review with hard exit threshold
rationale: Continue monthly merges while: merge-time <=2h, no patch broken >1x/quarter, customData field intact. Two consecutive quarters breaking any threshold: pin last-merged, accept divergence, re-evaluate thin @excalidraw/excalidraw wrapper. Without a stated exit the team risks indefinite half-merging. Documented in ADR 0004.

name: Phase 0 fork-bootstrap sequence
description: Sequence: clone Excalidraw → rename remotes (origin=atlasdraw, upstream=excalidraw) → corepack enable + yarn install → write LICENSE-AGPL/MIT/MPL + LICENSING.md → create ADRs 0001-0004 → write package skeletons (apps/atlas-app, apps/realtime, apps/storage, packages/*) → strip upstream telemetry → create decisions/upstream-patches.md + CI check → rename branch main.
